name: prompt-enhancer
description: Prompt enhancement and skill-routing plugin for Codex.

interface.longDescription: Prompt Enhancer rewrites rough requests into stronger prompts and can route execution to a better available skill in the current session.
defaultPrompt: Use Prompt Enhancer to rewrite my rough request before acting on it.
Use Prompt Enhancer and route to a better skill if one already fits.
Show the optimized prompt first, then continue the task.
